creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Briefly:
with xo_set_flags(NULL, XOF_FLUSH) and libxo=text: the first value (value1) after a label is not printed - xo_emit("{L:Value1}{:value1}"); -

The problem is reproducible (and described) in this file https://gitlab.com/alfix/nsysctl/blob/master/problem-xof-flush.c

Regards,
Alfonso
